scripts.i18n:check: npm run i18n:key-parity && npm run i18n:hardcoded-scan && npm run i18n:missing-marker-scan
scripts.dev: npm run env:sync && concurrently -n dashboard,backend,player -c cyan,green,magenta -m 3 "npm run dev -w apps/dashboard" "npm run start:dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/player"
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/dashboard && npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/player && npm run build -w apps/marketing
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/backend && npm run lint -w apps/dashboard && npm run lint -w apps/player && npm run lint -w apps/marketing
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/backend && npm run test -w apps/dashboard && npm run test -w apps/player
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:cov -w apps/backend && npm run test -w apps/dashboard && npm run test -w apps/player
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/backend && npm run typecheck -w apps/dashboard && npm run typecheck -w apps/player && npm run typecheck -w apps/marketing
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w apps/backend && npm run lint:fix -w apps/dashboard && npm run lint:fix -w apps/player && npm run lint:fix -w apps/marketing
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:cov && npm run i18n:check && npm run build
